title: Budgetary Relief Allowance Of Workers (Amendment)
text:
RC PL 15280

PARLIAMENT OF THE DEMOCRATIC SOCIALIST REPUBLIC OF SRI LANKA

BUDGETARY RELIEF ALLOWANCE OF WORKERS (AMENDMENT) ACT, No. 9 OF 2025

[Certi ed on 23rd of July, 2025]

Printed on the Order of Government

Published as a Supplement to Part II of the Gazette of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka of July 25, 2025

PRINTED AT THE DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT PRINTING, SRI LANKA ______________________________________________________________________________

TO BE PURCHASED AT THE GOVERNMENT PUBLICATIONS BUREAU, COLOMBO 5

Price : Rs. 48.00 Postage : Rs. 150.00

This Act can be downloaded from www.documents.gov.lk

1 Budgetary Relief Allowance of Workers (Amendment) Act, No. 9 of 2025

[Certi ed on 23rd of July, 2025]

L.D.-O 20/2025

A A B R A W A, N. 36 2005

BE it enacted by the Parliament of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka as follows: -

1. (1) This Act may be cited as the Budgetary Relief Allowance of Workers (Amendment) Act, No. 9 of 2025.

Short title and date of operation

(2) The provisions of this Act shall be deemed to have come into operation on April 1, 2025.

2. Section 3 of the Budgetary Relief Allowance of Workers Act, No. 36 of 2005 is hereby amended in subsection (1) thereof, by the substitution for the words and gures "With e ect from August 1, 2005", of the words and gures "For the period commencing on August 1, 2005 and ending on March 31, 2025, ".

Amendment of section 3 of Act, No. 36 of 2005

3. In the event of any inconsistency between the Sinhala and Tamil texts of this Act, the Sinhala text shall prevail.

Sinhala text to prevail in case of inconsistency

PL 15280 - 868 (06/2025)

Budgetary Relief Allowance of Workers (Amendment) Act, No. 9 of 2025 2

English Acts of the Parliament can be purchased at the PRAKASHANA PIYASA, DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT PRINTING, NO. 118, DR. DANISTER DE SILVA MAWATHA, COLOMBO 8.
